title: CI workflows and deploy infra
description:
Closed **2026-05-20** on superrepo [`f57377a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/f57377a) (v0.2 delivery tip).

Nox logging centralization, workflow refinements, site image **bun** lockfile, Coolify compose fixes, compiler CLI **GitHub Releases** publishing, and rolling version sync to the downloads page.

Workstreams: `ci-release`, `dev-experience`. **15** catalog tasks anchor this deliverable (`milestoneId: v02-ci-deploy-infra`).

## Provenance
- [`d63f938`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/d63f938) (`compiler`) — ci: move CLI publishing to GitHub Releases action
- [`0c97fde`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/0c97fde) (`beskid`) — fix(deploy): use monorepo bun lockfile in site image build
- [`44aed91`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/44aed91) (`compiler`) — chore(deps): bump rustls/rustls-webpki/rand to clear cargo-audit advisories
- [`f97e8e7`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/f97e8e7) (`compiler`) — chore(corelib): bump submodule for CI checkout submodules fix.
- [`5fba2e9`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/5fba2e9) (`beskid`) — fix(deploy): skip inactive bsharp submodule on Coolify shallow clone
- [`f1ba649`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/f1ba649) (`beskid`) — ci: upgrade nox baseline and bump compiler submodule
- [`f793c45`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/f793c45) (`beskid`) — chore(compiler): bump submodule for corelib publish CI
- [`0b36871`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/0b36871) (`beskid`) — chore(ci): refine workflows and agents guidance
- *…and 7 more seed tasks with provenance commits.*

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.2 (Analysis, packages, and platform spec)
- **Deliverable:** `v02-ci-deploy-infra` — CI workflows and deploy infra
